decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'corridor_hylan-boulevard-brt' is already the correct canonical record. The observation's source (201106_hylan_slides) is listed in that record's source_ids, and the alias 'corridor_hylan-blvd-study-corridor' / 'corridor_hylan-blvd-richmond-ave-study-corridor' already cover this label. The observation resolves to its own base_record_id with no different target to link to.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The map illustrates the Hylan Boulevard/Richmond Avenue Study Corridor. It features a proposed SBS route (solid red line) and Staten Island Railway stations
